column1: #   v0.1.6: ota slots bumped 2MB → 3MB; storage shrinks 4MB → ~1.9MB.
#   The voice + AEC + LVGL-curious path was eating the 2 MB slot
#   (build hit 99% full at v0.1.5). Storage residency is well under
#   1 MB (sprite cache + event log + voice diag)
#   trade-off goes to the application slot.
# With no `factory` partition the bootloader follows `otadata` to
# choose between ota_0 and ota_1. First USB flash writes to ota_0
# and the bootloader picks it because otadata is blank (== fall back
# to first valid ota_X). Every subsequent OTA update writes to the
# *other* slot and atomically flips otadata on reboot.
# IMPORTANT: this layout is binary-incompatible with the previous
# 2 MB / 2 MB / 4 MB layout. The first install of an image with
# this partition table MUST come over USB; we can't stage a new
# bootloader + new partition table from an old image's runtime.
# The reflash wipes the LittleFS storage partition (it moves from
